PROMPT: Our procurement team wants to flag our top-performing suppliers as 'preferred' vendors in the Airtable 'Supply Chain Analytics' base. Specifically, please do the following: (1) Retrieve all records from the 'Supplier Registry' table in the 'Supply Chain Analytics' base. (2) Identify the top 5 suppliers by QualityScore (highest scores first). (3) For each of those 5 suppliers, update their RiskLevel field value to 'preferred'. This is needed before our quarterly vendor review meeting so that downstream reports automatically highlight these vendors. Please complete all three steps and confirm which supplier records were updated.
